name: reopenGeneralForumTopic
description: Use this method to reopen a closed 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator rights. The topic will be automatically unhidden if it was hidden

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username
